title: A Journey Beyond
description: A role playing adventure pack filled with magic, mayhem, and exploration.
body:
![Pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WFegTLww/images/ee1212997ce17ba9b7dfd8e6f50fba88250886a1.png)

A role playing pack designed for adventure + community! Go adventuring, learn magic, collect loot, build a town, create a store. The possibilities are a number!!!


# Cook!
People gotta eat right?! Tons of food options to choose from. Create a tavern! Make some wine! Brew some tea! Eat that sandwhich! Whether you share the goods or keep it all to yourself like a goblin, there's lots to choose from.

- Bread!
- More bread!
- A potato somewhere
- Sushi!
- Some kind of fish (eww)
- Other stuff I couldn't type out!!!

![Cooking food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WFegTLww/images/fa4dd67a4aaba041d844e8555e0689ebcdacd0df.jpeg)


# Loot!
With a boatload of options, you have all the time in the world to gear up and look cool. Fun stuff even highlights like some kind of borderlands drop!

**It's mostly just the gear that lights up. Having everything light was super annoying.

![OOoooo loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WFegTLww/images/8f128318ea7023c80d811ad85104244e2d33cfb8.jpeg)


# Fly!
Need to get somewhere and too lazy to walk? Use flying machines! I mean I guess there's also a bunch of really cool mounts you could use too. I know I will be. Who needs an airship?

![Fly that airship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WFegTLww/images/d9bf34ca6263470b7ac3c65594470cffa647ddc0.jpeg)


# Spend!
Fill that coin purse full of gold and spend it all at the local tavern like a real adventurer. Or I guess you can sell that stuff you "found" on that corpse over there when no one was looking.

Also if you're really cool you can make your own currency for your special village.

![Money MONEY!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WFegTLww/images/79ca9c8bb28a6724ffb651076e41b50338602226.jpeg)


# Disclaimer!
This pack was made very much for fun for personal use, and to have a good time with friends. Feel free to share fun screenshots that I can use in the gallery for it. I was too lazy to go build a bunch of stuff while I was testing.

You can make suggestions for additions or tweaks, but 0 promises I'll do it. It comes down to my own fun level.

Have a crab!

![crabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WFegTLww/images/a673edcb17fa68876245d88d1a055d4b1c1acb61.png)


# Partnership & Hosting
The creation of this project is happily sponsored by [Nodecraft](https://nodecraft.com/r/brindlydotart). They graciously provide hardware in order to test these projects in multiplayer environments, as well as hosting some packs as part of their one-click install feature.

If you want to host a server, and need stability for sensible cost, I absolutely recommend them. I've been using them for around a decade prior to any sort of partnership as a paying customer. If you use the links in this blurb, or code `brindlydotart`, I might get a small commission (neat) but you definitely get a 30% discount on first order.

![Sponsor banner](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/jbneoz2l7568jlmgagw19/nodecraft_partner_banner.png?rlkey=303y7opi0gtgfudjr60h8jizl&dl=1)
